description: Style NoteThe Spanish influences in the design details of this sandal is the reason for the Spanish name, senorita. Subtle pastel hues, super soft footbed styling and classic designs with a sophisticated polish, style this pair with kohl-rimmed eyes and an ethno-western ensemble!Product DescriptionSandal with thong style criss- cross straps in reddish pink with an embellishment Smooth footbedTPR outsole with wave pattern grooves on the forefoot and a fancy heelMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
